title: Midnight Poached Clams
description: A rich and indulgent Vietnamese-inspired dish that's perfect for satisfying your midnight cravings. This recipe features succulent poached clams in a flavorful sauce.
instructions: Rinse the clams under cold water and scrub them clean.
In a large saucepan, combine the water, fish sauce, lime juice, brown sugar, and chili flakes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the saucepan and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and add the clams to the saucepan,cover with a lid.
Poach the clams for 3-5 minutes or until they open.
Serve the clams hot with chopped cilantro, if desired.
Optional: you can also add some sliced green onions or toasted peanuts on top for added flavor and texture.
